goals.description: Drop the scholarship essay completely. It's due in three days, not hours, and I'm too drained to do it right now without resenting the rush.
goals.rationale: My relationships are worth way more than this essay at this exact moment. If I force it now, I'll resent the quality drop and drag down my whole mood. goals.description: Go to sleep now. No more scrolling, no more 'just one more minute' of doom-scrolling before I collapse.
goals.rationale: My physical stamina is low enough that pushing further will just make me crash hard and embarrass myself later. Getting actual rest is non-negotiable for my health and future growth. If I try to squeeze in fun or work now, I'll just burn out faster. Sleeping early is the most efficient way to handle everything else tomorrow.
